message:
chore: update workspace lockfile and spec evolution visualization

- Cargo.lock: regenerate with new dependencies from parser, harness
  eprocess, and window-builtins additions
- spec visualization HTML: update interactive timeline to include the
  latest specification revision covering VDBE, WAL I/O, write-merge
  policy, and parser lexer milestones
